item.title: 台風消滅したらしいですね🌀 とはいえ雨は続くみたいなので、ジメジメとは付き合っていかねば😫 土曜の夜、夜更かしして…
item.author: 白川えま✨Aroma Levante (@emalevante.bsky.social)
item.description:
台風消滅したらしいですね🌀
とはいえ雨は続くみたいなので、ジメジメとは付き合っていかねば😫

土曜の夜、夜更かししてるお兄様🥰
よかったらオイルマッサージで癒されに来ませんか✨
この後2:00までDMお返事できませんので、ご予約の方はお店まで📞

お待ちしております(*´˘`*)♡

#メンエス #メンズエステ #代々木
item.content:encoded:
台風消滅したらしいですね🌀
とはいえ雨は続くみたいなので、ジメジメとは付き合っていかねば😫

item.title: Even with global unemployment at historically low levels, wo…
item.author: CNBC (@cnbc.com)

item.content:encoded:

item.title: From Scandinavia to the Alps, Europeans endured sweltering c…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: From Scandinavia to the Alps, Europeans endured sweltering conditions on Saturday as a heatwave linked to dozens of deaths spread eastwards, with record-breaking temperatures breaching 40 degrees Celsius (104 degrees Fahrenheit) in some spots. https://cnn.it/4w7a3po
item.content:encoded: From Scandinavia to the Alps, Europeans endured sweltering conditions on Saturday as a heatwave linked to dozens of deaths spread eastwards, with record-breaking temperatures breaching 40 degrees Celsius (104 degrees Fahrenheit) in some spots. https://cnn.it/4w7a3po

item.title: 外撮影、というか紫陽花と私で写真撮る予定だったのに忙殺されており結局とれなかった🪷適当な人間すぎる𓃠‪

item.description: 外撮影、というか紫陽花と私で写真撮る予定だったのに忙殺されており結局とれなかった🪷適当な人間すぎる𓃠‪
item.content:encoded: 外撮影、というか紫陽花と私で写真撮る予定だったのに忙殺されており結局とれなかった🪷適当な人間すぎる𓃠‪

item.title: Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began co…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began collecting others’ stories of abuse. 156 women answered her call.

Together, they became “survivor sisters” — and helped shape a new law offering them a path toward freedom. But would it work?

Listen to the full episode:
item.content:encoded:
Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began collecting others’ stories of abuse. 156 women answered her call.

Together, they became “survivor sisters” — and helped shape a new law offering them a path toward freedom. But would it work?

Listen to the full episode:

item.title: ローリー・アンダーソンが 京都賞を受賞されたそうです おめでとうございます🍾 彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード 俺の太極…
item.author: 翻訳の吉田俊太郎 (@shuntaroyoshida.bsky.social)
item.description:
ローリー・アンダーソンが
京都賞を受賞されたそうです
おめでとうございます🍾

彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード　俺の太極拳』(国書刊行会)も面白いですよ。
ご興味ある方はぜひ！
item.content:encoded:
ローリー・アンダーソンが
京都賞を受賞されたそうです
おめでとうございます🍾

彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード　俺の太極拳』(国書刊行会)も面白いですよ。
ご興味ある方はぜひ！

item.title: The FAA is investigating after a United Airlines flight enco…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The FAA is investigating after a United Airlines flight encountered a drone during its descent into Newark Liberty International Airport on Friday evening, according to agency officials.
item.content:encoded: The FAA is investigating after a United Airlines flight encountered a drone during its descent into Newark Liberty International Airport on Friday evening, according to agency officials.

item.title: I would read letters like Emily’s every night in the White H…
item.author: Barack Obama (@barackobama.bsky.social)
item.description: I would read letters like Emily’s every night in the White House. They were powerful reminders of why the work we did mattered, and who we were fighting for.

item.title: Sports clips' rise on platforms like YouTube has left broadc…
item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)
item.description:
Sports clips' rise on platforms like YouTube has left broadcasters debating whether to use them to attract younger viewers or protect their subscription revenue (Lillian Rizzo/CNBC)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Across Europe, countries are shattering heat records and beg…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: Across Europe, countries are shattering heat records and beginning to reconsider long-held taboos in how they respond.
item.content:encoded: Across Europe, countries are shattering heat records and beginning to reconsider long-held taboos in how they respond.

item.title: In May, the White House announced that its new app would be …
item.author: WIRED (@wired.com)
item.description: In May, the White House announced that its new app would be automatically downloaded onto the work phones of millions of government employees. The problem: Federal workers hate it and can’t get rid of it.
item.content:encoded: In May, the White House announced that its new app would be automatically downloaded onto the work phones of millions of government employees. The problem: Federal workers hate it and can’t get rid of it.

item.title: Texas has decided public schools should teach Noah's Ark, th…
item.author: Hemant Mehta (@friendlyatheist.com)
item.description:
Texas has decided public schools should teach Noah's Ark, the Burning Bush, Adam & Eve, and more as required reading.

It's terrible news for religious freedom.

It's also terrible news for Christianity itself.

www.friendlyatheist.com/p/texas-just...
item.content:encoded:
Texas has decided public schools should teach Noah's Ark, the Burning Bush, Adam & Eve, and more as required reading.

It's terrible news for religious freedom.

It's also terrible news for Christianity itself.

www.friendlyatheist.com/p/texas-just...
